item.title: Baby braids!! [OC]
item.description: BABY BRAIDS! I even made my own ceramic beads for in my hair, I feel immaculate! Highly recommend anyone to try some little braids ;D If you like my stuff and want to see more, come support me on Patreon! —> https://www.patreon.com/AmyRevives

item.title: memes
item.description:
In truth, only eyebrow gestures are universal. Eyebrows also keep their pigment longer than the hair on your head as you age.
This bread knife in a Swiss restaurant has a silhouette of the major peaks in Switzerland
tax
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: Coming Out... as a DJ (Finally)
item.description: Told you all I would keep sharing my content here as I continue to just... make more and more of it in various forms ;D In my latest YoutTube vid I talk a little about learning to DJ and why, and spin for a bit just to have some fun! Part of me wants this to make the FP if only to make people see my terrible thumbnail pun there and groan.... Check it out to watch me do some spinning! https://youtu.be/HaloxZVxlAE
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Several tools, techniques, factories ... I've found amazing recently.
item.description:
Casting low-melt alloy bars
2. Car Factory Robots
3. Ceiling work made easy
4. Kinda gross but efficient
5. Simple invention DIY Handmade Tools
6. High-Speed CNC Machining in Action
7. Looks nice and smooth
8. It's that easy ! get a good knocker.
9. This Screwdriver.
10. TIL about plastic welders.
11. For people that work on the ground. Banana for scale.
12. One fits all. Works probably on new screws only.
13. Broom head factory.
14. Foam so smooth it looks like he’s working with whipped cream.
15. Physical Key Copying.

(Based on a real conversation I overhead)
BONUS panel (and loads more!) for patrons! https://www.patreon.com/litterboxcomics Bonus panels are only possible thanks to the support of my wonderful patrons! I know not everyone can afford to support, which is why bonuses become free a year later when I repost!

item.title: Jimmy Gomez (D) highlighted data from the nonpartisan Joint Committee on Taxation indicating that by 2031, individuals earning less than $15,000 annually would experience a 74.3% increase in federal taxes.
item.description:
While those earning between $15,000 and $30,000 would see a 20.6% increase. Gomez stated, “You have no shame when it comes to hurting working men and women in this country.”
Keep it up, Congressman Gomez. We need to hear more voices like yours. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=60lPtsMXzSo
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.title: getting out of an impossibly tight parking spot
item.dc:creator: Kyzyl

item.title: After all, why not? Why shouldn’t I make room on my phone by dumping memes? Volume 16
item.description:
Erry day!
I FUCKING LOVE CHEESE!
It happens every morning…and yet I’m still shocked by it
Don’t like that one. A signier sign maybe?
Tiny idiots
I find the silliest shit funny and that brings me joy
Stay fresh, cheesebags!

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1366 (Grindr in Narnia)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Reply of the Zaporozhian Corgis
Yes, it's Loss.
Yo, if you're one of these and single, hit me up I guess?
Has anyone tried making a sandwich like this? How was it?
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Glory to Pippin. Pippin. [Coughing noises]" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Dotty mini dress Hex
item.description: Hexiaaaaa<3 Happy Tuesday!!!! Ahhh! I started watching Sex and the City…honestly 10/10 season 1. I loved it. This show is older than me so I’m a bit late to watching it. XD Extra art: www.patreon.com/miaormoa
